message:
docs(reservation): clarify conflict rate calculation semantics

Improves documentation for getAgentConflictStats() conflictRate metric:

Before: Calculated as conflicts / (reservations + conflicts), treating
  conflicts as "failed attempts" which doesn't match actual semantics

After: Calculated as conflicts / reservations, representing "conflicts
  per successful reservation" ratio

Key insight documented:
- One failed reservation attempt can generate multiple conflict records
  if it overlaps with several existing reservations
- A rate > 100% is semantically valid: the agent may cause more
  conflicts than they have successful reservations
- This is a ratio metric, not a failure rate

The denominator change from (reservations + conflicts) to reservations
makes the metric more interpretable for analytics dashboards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
